projectDescription: A decision-support platform for pitch competition and hackathon organizers that uses AI judges to evaluate participant presentations and produce structured reports, with organizers setting final scores for the leaderboard.
keyFeatures: AI judge panel with role-based evaluation (Pitch Competition: 6 judges across P1-P6 dimensions; Hackathon: 5 judges across H1-H6 dimensions; Custom mode)
Two submission collection modes: manual entry by organizer or public self-upload page for participants
Structured participant reports with AI scores per dimension, strengths/weaknesses, red flags, and evidence citations
Human-in-the-Loop Jury Review: organizer sets final Jury Scores after reviewing AI analysis and conducting live Q&A
Leaderboard ranked by organizer's Jury Scores, not AI scores — human decision is final
Questions for Participants generated by AI to assist live Q&A sessions
Judge Contribution Matrix showing each judge's scores and spread across dimensions
Deck completeness signals highlighting missing or weak sections in pitch materials
Support for PDF, PPTX, and Google Slides pitch decks
publicApiSurface: POST /api/judging/start — start AI evaluation pipeline for a project
GET /api/judging/status — get evaluation progress and per-participant status
POST /api/pipeline/decode — SSE endpoint for streaming pitch deck decoder steps (debug mode)
/e/<slug> — public self-upload submission page for participants (no login required)
